Module com.lulow.justtype
Package com.lulow.justtype.model

Class AudioClips

java.lang.Object
com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioClips
public final class AudioClips extends Object
Constants for all audio file names used in the game. All files are expected to be located under the /sfx/ resource folder.

    Description
    static final String
    CONFETTI_POP
    Pop sound when confetti fires.

    Beep played when the timer reaches critical seconds.
